reference: When bone cracking occurs, it takes around two to four weeks to heal, sometimes up to six weeks. This is normal. Avoid heavy work, take rest, and maintain a good diet; these will help the bones to heal quickly.
text: When bone cracking occurs, it takes around 2 to 4 weeks to heal, sometimes up to 6 weeks. This is normal. Avoid heavy work, take rest, and maintain a good diet; these will help the bones to heal quickly.
